form.label: SplunkGate Setup
form.description: Enable the ML training pipeline after MLTK is installed and at least 7 days of verdict events have been emitted to the cisco_ai_defense:splunkgate_verdict sourcetype.

html.p: The 5 ML saved searches under SplunkGate - Setup/Train/Anomaly ship disabled by default. Enabling them requires:

ol.li: Splunk Machine Learning Toolkit (MLTK) installed — Splunkbase app 2890.
At least 7 days of cisco_ai_defense:splunkgate_verdict events ingested (otherwise the cold-start setup fits on an empty baseline).
Bootstrap the profile index once by running SplunkGate - Bootstrap profile index from Search & Reporting.

html.p: After those three prerequisites are met, navigate to Settings → Searches, reports, and alerts, filter by the prefix SplunkGate - , and toggle the 5 ML pipeline searches from disabled to enabled. Cron schedule 15 */6 * * * runs each one every 6 hours.
Once the setup searches have run at least once, the trained models appear via:
Anomalies surfaced by the AD pipeline land in the splunkgate_verdict_history KV-store collection — query via | inputlookup splunkgate_verdict_history_lookup | where anomaly_type="Verdict Burst".
